transcript: The story begins with a young man named Jung Zee Soo riding his bicycle to school. Meanwhile, a high school girl named Euon Sung Keen is trying to find her classroom in the school area. While searching, Euon accidentally bumps into Zee Soo, who is looking at his phone, and they collide. This causes Euon to lose her balance, and almost fall down the stairs, along with her phone. Zee Soo rushes to save her and her phone from getting damaged. During this chaos, Yuan grabs onto Zisu's tie, and they unexpectedly share their first kiss. Afterward, Yuan apologizes but Zisu ignores her and walks away. Yuan secretly takes a picture of him as he leaves. Later, Yuan attends a student meeting in the school hall, where the headmaster calls upon an exceptional student to represent the students. She is surprised to discover that the outstanding student is Zisou, the same person who saved and kissed her earlier in the day. Yuan instantly falls in love with Zisou, a brilliant student with an IQ of 200, and she is placed in the class for high-achieving students, known as Class A. Two years pass and Yuwen still has feelings for Zisu. She keeps up with his updates through his social media profiles. One day, while dealing with a beehive in her class's classroom, Yuwen checks her phone and learns that Zisu is returning to the building reserved for gifted students like him. Yuwen and many other Zisu fans start running to catch a glimpse of their idol in person. However, they face obstacles because the building's security system only allows students with high IQs to enter. Yuwen, being considered less intelligent, can only watch Zisu from afar. Yuwen went to a seminar where Zisu was one of the speakers. She fell even more in love with him and was determined to tell him how she felt. But when Yuwen heard that Zisu was getting close to a beautiful girl named Sawi, she felt really sad and hopeless. She went to the school rooftop to be alone because of her sadness. However, her friends came to remind her to stop dreaming about dating Zisu. A young man named Ah-Jin tried to approach Yoan. Still, Yoan insisted that she wouldn't give up and would confess her love to Zisou no matter what. Yuan and her friends then made a plan to get into Building A and meet Zisou to confess her feelings. Yuan finally got her chance when the school's fire alarm suddenly went off, causing a power outage and shutting down all technology. She quickly ran to Building A and saw that the door was open. Yuan went inside and found Zisu. Without wasting any time, she bravely expressed her love for him. Unfortunately, Zisu rejected Yuan and openly said that he didn't like girls who weren't smart. Yuan was very sad and hurt by his words. To make things worse, all the students in class, A recorded the embarrassing moment when Zisu rejected Yuan and made fun of her. Even the teachers and the headmaster scolded Yuan for bothering Zisu. The next day, while Yuan was drying clothes in her yard, her father, who was drunk, ran out of the house and said they would have a new home. Yuan reminded her father that they already had a house. But then, their house suddenly collapsed because it was poorly constructed the collapse building quickly became a big news story and everyone started talking about Yuan her friends tried to help by organizing a fundraising event for her but she felt even more embarrassed one day when zisu and his friend passed by Yuan and the students from class F they made fun of them and assumed none of the class F students were smart. This hurt Yuan's feelings, and she challenged Zisu to prove that Class F students could be in the top 100 for an upcoming test. Zisu accepted the challenge. Meanwhile, Yuan helped her father collect usable items from their ruined house. Her father received a call from an old friend who invited them to stay at his home temporarily. When they arrived at the friend's house, they were surprised to see a very big and fancy house. Yuan felt lucky to be able to stay there, even if it was just for a while. The friend's wife introduced their youngest son, Yu Su, who didn't seem happy about Yuan and her father being in their house. However, his mother told him to be polite because they were guests. The wife was enthusiastic about Yuan's presence and talked about her oldest son, who was smart and popular at school. She even suggested that Yuan marry him. But Yuan declined because she had feelings for someone else, even though he had rejected her in a very harsh way. That evening, Yuan discovers that Zisu is actually the eldest son of the family when he visits her in her room. Zisu asks Yuan to keep this a secret from everyone in the house. At school, Yuan's friends remind her about her challenge to make it into the top 100 list. She feels hopeless and unsure if she can meet the challenge because she struggles with learning. She also feels down when she sees Zisu and Salwi getting closer, even though they're not officially dating. Yuan receives a message from Zisu's mother through her phone, sparking an idea. She becomes determined to prove that not all Class F students are unintelligent, and decides to take on the challenge of making it into the top 100 list. To avoid the embarrassment of failing to make the list, Yuan asks Zisu to help her study for the trial exam. Zisu reluctantly agrees because Yuan has a humiliating video of him sent by his mother. He agrees on the condition that Yuan deletes the video from her phone. Zisu starts tutoring Yuan every night, using an approach that helps her understand difficult lessons. At school, Yuan becomes very focused on her studies and sometimes doesn't pay attention to her surroundings. Ajin stays close to make sure she doesn't get hurt. When the exam finally arrives, Yuan feels confident about answering the questions, even though she's not sure if she got them all right. On the other side, Zisu is concerned about Yuan and hopes she does well in her exams. When the exam results and rankings are announced, Yuan rushes to check and is relieved to see Zisu is still ranked first. She worries that he might have dropped in the rankings because he spent a lot of time helping her. But she manages to achieve her goal and ranks 100. Skipping ahead during a school sports event, Zisu's class competes against Yuan's class in a marathon race. Zisu's class wins because of a mistake made by Yuan. Unexpectedly, Zisu's mother comes to the school to support her son and reveals that Yuan is staying at their house. This leads to questions about Yuan and Zisu's relationship. Zisu pretends that Yuan is just his assistant to calm everyone down. This upsets Ajin, who gets into a fight with Zisu due to his disrespectful behavior towards Yuan. Frustrated by Zisu's attitude, Yuan breaks up with both Zisu and Ajin, saying she no longer has feelings for Zisu. Later, Zisu's friend humiliates Yuan by showing a video of her confessing her love for Zisu. In retaliation, Yuan shares an embarrassing video of Zisu dressed as a woman with a long wig dancing. An annoyed Zisu pulls Yuan away from the chaos. When they are alone, Yuan expresses her regret for liking a selfish and arrogant person like Zisu. She tells him she won't bother him anymore and plans to find another handsome boyfriend. As Yuan's about to leave, Zisu takes her hand and kisses her on the lips. Long story short, Yoan and Jisoo have graduated from high school and are getting ready for the college entrance exam. During this time, Jisoo faces some challenges, like Yoan having an accident that distracts her from her studies. One night, Jisoo argues with his father because his father wants him to study in the United States and take over the family business. However, Jisoo dreams of becoming a veterinarian and leaves home in frustration. Yoohyeon feels responsible for what happened and apologizes to Jisoo's parents before going after him. When they meet, Yoohyeon apologizes again and decides to move out of Jisoo's house. The next day, Jisoo leaves home to start his own life, without the pressure from his parents. Both Jisoo and Euon attend the same university but lead separate lives. However, Euon worries about Jisoo because she hasn't heard from him for a while. She eventually learns that Jisoo is working part-time at a veterinary clinic and visits him there. Even though Jisoo acts distant, he secretly cares about Euon. In the evening, Euon follows Jisoo to his apartment and sees Sawi there, thinking they are dating. It turns out that Sawi is only there for business. Zisu spends time with Yuan, but he receives news that his father is sick. So he takes over his father's business while his father is in the hospital, which adds more stress to his life. Although he cares for Yuan, Zisu gives more priority to the business. He decides to leave Yuan to marry another woman to merge their businesses and save his father's company. Yuan is hurt and rejects his love, running away. Zisu's parents disagree with his decision to marry for business reasons and tell him that love should come from the heart. A year passes and Yuan is checking Zisuou's social media. Zisou posts about speaking at an assembly in the school hall, so Yuan goes there reluctantly. However, when she arrives, she realizes that she's the only one there. Zisou hides and Yuan calls Zisou's brother, who tells her that only specific people can see Zisou's posts. Yuan understands that the posts were meant for her. Zisu then proposes to Yuan, and she agrees. In a flashback at the end, Zisu wakes up from his sleep during the time he was tutoring Yuan and sees a love letter Yuan wrote for him. So the moral of the drama is don't be discouraged if you accidentally kiss someone while saving their life, and they reject you for not being a genius. Life's full of bee-filled challenges, collapsing houses, and unexpected love proposals. Let's roll with it. We'll see you next time.
